use_cases: Displaying fitness and health metrics like calories burned, exercise minutes, and standing hours
Creating wellness tracking dashboards for health apps and wearables
Visualizing progress toward daily activity goals in a gamified fitness interface
Building Apple Watch-style activity visualizations for mobile health applications
Monitoring personal wellness metrics in corporate wellness programs
ai_summary: A visually striking activity ring component inspired by Apple Watch's activity rings, displaying fitness metrics (Move, Exercise, Stand) as concentric circular progress indicators. Features smooth entrance animations, gradient-filled progress arcs, and a clean modern aesthetic. The component renders three layered SVG rings with real-time progress calculations, ideal for health tracking, fitness apps, and wellness monitoring dashboards. Supports customizable colors, sizes, and data values for flexible integration into various health and fitness platforms.
